title: AIADMK's M.R. Vijayabhaskar reclaims Karur seat by 1,821 votes; DMK pushed to third
summary: Veteran AIADMK leader M.R. Vijayabhaskar reclaimed the Karur Assembly seat by a tight 1,821-vote margin, with DMK pushed to a distant third behind a strong TVK debut.

title: TVK's M. Sathya wins Krishnarayapuram (SC) — party's first seat in Karur
summary: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam opened its account in Karur with M. Sathya winning the Krishnarayapuram (SC) reserved constituency, calling it a vote for clean and inclusive politics.

title: Aravakurichi DMK's R. Elango retains, but margin drops to 3,450
summary: Aravakurichi's R. Elango retained the seat for DMK but with a sharply reduced margin of 3,450 votes, indicating a significant TVK and AIADMK consolidation in rural pockets.

title: Kulithalai DMK's Sriyanur A. Chandran survives by just 233 votes after TVK surge
summary: Kulithalai delivered Karur's closest finish, with DMK's Sriyanur A. Chandran scraping through by just 233 votes after a late-round TVK surge that almost swung the seat.

title: Karur home textile exporters meet Vijayabhaskar, demand power tariff cut
summary: Karur's home textile exporters met re-elected MLA M.R. Vijayabhaskar on May 5 and pressed for a state-level industrial power tariff cut linked to export performance.

title: Krishnarayapuram TVK's Sathya promises Dalit welfare board revival
summary: Krishnarayapuram's TVK winner M. Sathya said reviving the Tamil Nadu Dalit welfare board with a fresh budget allocation would be her opening intervention in the new assembly.

title: Aravakurichi school upgradation project cleared by DMK MLA
summary: Aravakurichi's re-elected DMK MLA R. Elango announced the formal clearance of the constituency school upgradation project with smart classrooms and chemistry labs.

title: Kulithalai highway flyover work to resume after DMK's narrow win
summary: Stalled work on the Kulithalai highway flyover will resume next week after the DMK's narrow win, with the MLA confirming a fresh state highways funding tranche.

title: Karur bus stand renovation tenders floated
summary: Karur municipality has floated tenders for a comprehensive renovation of the central bus stand, including new passenger amenities, EV charging slots and an improved layout.

title: AIADMK's Vijayabhaskar named likely opposition chief whip from Kongu
summary: AIADMK insiders said Karur MLA M.R. Vijayabhaskar is being considered for the role of opposition chief whip, anchoring the party's Kongu region voice in the new assembly.

title: TVK's Karur district secretary calls for membership drive after historic win
summary: TVK's Karur district secretary called for a fresh membership drive across all four constituencies, citing the Krishnarayapuram win as proof of opening space for the party.

title: Pallapatti residents celebrate DMK's Aravakurichi win
summary: Pallapatti residents organised a low-key celebration after DMK's Aravakurichi win, crediting local panchayat workers for protecting the party's grassroots vote bank.

title: Karur-Namakkal-Tiruchi road widening gets in-principle nod
summary: The proposal to widen the Karur-Namakkal-Tiruchi inter-district corridor has received an in-principle nod from the state highways department, paving the way for tendering.

title: DMK holds post-election review: 'Near loss in Kulithalai a wake-up call'
summary: DMK's Karur unit held an internal post-election review on May 5 and called the near loss in Kulithalai a 'wake-up call' that demanded urgent grassroots reorganisation.

title: Karur district voter turnout 83.4 percent — highest in Kongu region
summary: Karur district recorded a final voter turnout of 83.4 percent, the highest in the Kongu region, with election officials crediting saturation outreach and youth participation.
